name: ErrorBoundary
description:
Top-level error boundary that catches unhandled React errors and
displays a recovery UI instead of crashing to a white screen.

name: CommandAPI
description:
Registry for slash-menu commands and keybindings.

Plugins register commands in their `onload()` method. The slash menu
reads the full list via `getAll()`. The `executeCommand()` helper
centralizes dispatch logic for insertText vs editorCallback commands.

methods.name: register
methods.description: Register a command for a plugin.

methods.name: unregister
methods.description: Remove all commands for a plugin.

methods.name: getAll
methods.description: Get a flat list of all registered commands (for slash menu).

methods.name: executeCommand
methods.description:
Centralized dispatch: determines whether to use editorCallback
or insertText+cursorOffset, and executes accordingly.

Slash menu calls this instead of implementing its own
dispatch logic.

name: EditorAPI
description:
Runtime extension management for the editor

Each plugin gets its own Compartment for independent configuration.

methods.name: setView
methods.description: // Called when the EditorView is created/destroyed.

methods.name: getInitialExtensions
methods.description:
Returns the initial array of Extensions.

Extensions are ordered in the plugin registration order.

methods.name: registerExtensions
methods.description:
Registers the extensions for a plugin. Replaces the plugins extension
set.

methods.name: unregisterExtensions
methods.description: // Remove the extensions of a plugin.

methods.name: reconfigure
methods.description: // Reconfigure the editor with the new extensions.

methods.name: getActiveView
methods.description: // Get the active EditorView.

name: UIAPI
description: UI contribution API.

methods.name: registerCalloutType
methods.description: Register a callout type contributed by a plugin.

methods.name: unregisterCalloutTypes
methods.description: Remove all callout types registered by a plugin.

methods.name: getCalloutTypes
methods.description: Get a flat list of all registered callout types.

methods.name: registerSidebarAction
methods.description: // --- Sidebar actions ---

methods.name: registerUIAction
methods.description: // --- UI actions (layout regions) ---

methods.name: registerPaletteCommand
methods.description: // --- Command palette ---

methods.name: registerSettingsTab
methods.description: // --- Settings tabs ---

name: VaultAPI
description: Wraps Tauri vault operations behind an API surface.

methods.name: getVaultPath
methods.description: Get the current vault path, or null if none is open.

methods.name: listFiles
methods.description: List all files in the vault.

methods.name: readFile
methods.description: Read a file's contents.

methods.name: writeFile
methods.description: Write content to a file.

methods.name: getFileTags
methods.description: Get indexed tags for a specific file.

methods.name: onFileChange
methods.description: Subscribe to file change events. Returns EventRef for auto-cleanup.

name: WorkspaceAPI
description:
Wraps the editor store for workspace-level operations.
Plugins use this instead of importing the Zustand store directly.

methods.name: getVaultPath
methods.description: Get the current vault path, or null.

methods.name: getActiveNote
methods.description: Get the currently active note, or null.

methods.name: setVaultPath
methods.description: Set the current vault path.

methods.name: setActiveNote
methods.description: Set the active note directly.

methods.name: setViewMode
methods.description: Set the current view mode.

methods.name: getEditorMode
methods.description: Get the current editor mode.

methods.name: setEditorMode
methods.description: Set the current editor mode.

methods.name: onEditorModeChange
methods.description: Subscribe to editor mode changes.

methods.name: setExpandedFolders
methods.description: Replace expanded folders map.

methods.name: getBacklinks
methods.description: Get backlinks for a note path.

methods.name: getOutgoingLinks
methods.description: Get outgoing links for a note path.

methods.name: openNote
methods.description: Navigate to a note by setting it as the active note.

methods.name: openNoteByMetadata
methods.description:
Navigate to a note by providing its metadata. Ensures it is present
in the workspace file list before activating.

methods.name: onActiveNoteChange
methods.description: Subscribe to active note changes. Returns EventRef for auto-cleanup.

name: CalloutPlugin
description: Callout Plugin — wraps the existing createCalloutPlugin factory.

name: CoreCommandsPlugin
description: Core Commands Plugin — registers all basic markdown slash commands.

name: FrontmatterPlugin
description: Frontmatter Plugin — renders YAML frontmatter as a properties widget.

name: InlineTagsPlugin
description: Inline Tags Plugin — styles matching #tags inside the editor text view.

name: MermaidPlugin
description: Mermaid Plugin — renders mermaid code blocks as diagrams.

name: WikiLinkPlugin
description:
WikiLink Plugin — wraps the existing createWikiLinkPlugin factory.

Navigation on link click delegates back to WorkspaceAPI.openNote().

name: EventBus
description:
Lightweight event emitter powering all plugin event subscriptions.

Plugins receive opaque `EventRef` tokens when subscribing; the registry
collects them and calls `removeAll()` during plugin unload for automatic cleanup.

methods.name: on
methods.description: Subscribe to an event. Returns an opaque ref for unsubscription.

methods.name: off
methods.description: Unsubscribe a single event ref.

methods.name: removeAll
methods.description: Batch-unsubscribe a list of refs. Used by Plugin._cleanup().

name: Plugin
description:
Base class for all plugins.

Lifecycle:
1. PluginRegistry instantiates the plugin
2. Registry sets `plugin.app` and `plugin.manifest` before calling `onload()`
3. Plugin calls convenience methods in `onload()`
4. Plugin calls `plugin[PLUGIN_CLEANUP]()` when the app is unloaded

methods.name: onload
methods.description:
// --- Lifecycle ---
// Called when the plugin is activated

methods.name: onunload
methods.description: // Called when te plugin is deactivated

methods.name: registerEditorExtension
methods.description:
// --- Convenience methods ---
// Register Editor extensions

methods.name: registerCommand
methods.description: // Register a command

methods.name: registerEvent
methods.description: // Tracks an event subscription for automatic cleanup

name: PluginRegistry
description:
Central registry for managing plugin lifecycle with error isolation.

Each plugin is registered with its manifest and class constructor.
The registry owns instantiation, injects the app reference and handles
load/unload with try/catch so one failure doesn't affect others.

methods.name: register
methods.description: // Register a plugin class

methods.name: loadAll
methods.description: // Load all registered plugins

methods.name: unloadAll
methods.description: // Unload all registered plugins

methods.name: enable
methods.description: // Re-enable a disabled plugin

methods.name: disable
methods.description: // Disable a plugin

methods.name: getPlugin
methods.description: // Get a plugin by ID

methods.name: isDisabled
methods.description: // Check if plugin is disabled

methods.name: list
methods.description: // List all registered plugins with enabled state

methods.name: initializeDisabled
methods.description: // Seed disabled plugins before loadAll()

methods.name: setEnabled
methods.description: // Toggle a plugin with status result

name: TessellumApp
description:
Central app singleton for managing plugins, events, and API access.

Accessible from anywhere:
- Editor extensions: `TessellumApp.instance`
- React components: `useTessellumApp()` hook

Use `TessellumApp.create()` instead of `new TessellumApp()` to create a new instance.
